title: Mighty Medicinal Saudi Arabian Chicken Kebabs
description: A unique and flavorful dish featuring double-fry KFC style chicken, digestive biscuits, and anti-inflammatory spices, served on a comal.
instructions: Preheat the comal over medium high heat.
In a large bowl, mix together the crushed digestive biscuits, KFC style seasoning, turmeric, ginger, garlic, salt, and black pepper.
Add the chicken breast pieces to the bowl and toss to coat evenly.
Drizzle the olive oil over the chicken and toss again to coat.
Thread the coated chicken pieces onto skewers.
Double fry the chicken by frying it in oil for 5 minutes, then baking it in the oven at 400 degrees for 10 minutes.
Serve the chicken kebabs hot on the comal.
Garnish with fresh parsley and serve with a side of yogurt sauce.
Let the kebabs rest for 5 minutes before serving.
